mapper.select: SELECT * FROM exchange_product ORDER BY brand, battery_model
SELECT * FROM exchange_product WHERE status = 1 AND stock > 0 ORDER BY brand, battery_model
SELECT * FROM exchange_product WHERE brand = #{brand} ORDER BY battery_model
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO exchange_product (product_name, brand, battery_model, points_required, stock, image_url, description, status) VALUES (#{productName}, #{brand}, #{batteryModel}, #{pointsRequired}, #{stock}, #{imageUrl}, #{description}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE exchange_product SET stock = stock - #{quantity} WHERE id = #{id} AND stock >= #{quantity}
